description: A small sample writing-plans-plus plan used for task-checker evals.
goal: Demonstrate per-task completion, drift detection, and test adequacy auditing.
architecture: Tasks are intentionally varied: one is complete with strong criteria, one is partial with weak testing, and one depends on another task.

tasks.title: Add request ID propagation
tasks.description: Propagate a request_id through logging so traces are correlated across services.
steps: Add request_id field to request context
Ensure logger includes request_id in all log lines
Add unit tests for request_id propagation
validation_criteria: Logger output includes request_id when present in context
When request_id is missing, logger does not print placeholder strings
Unit tests assert request_id formatting and propagation behavior

tasks.title: Implement JSON config loader
tasks.description: Load config from a JSON file with schema validation and helpful error messages.
validation_criteria: Invalid config files produce actionable error messages
Tests cover at least one success and one failure case

tasks.title: Add CLI flag --config
tasks.description: Allow selecting config file path via a --config CLI flag.
steps: Add integration test that runs CLI with --config
validation_criteria: CLI accepts --config <path> and uses it to load configuration
If the config file does not exist, CLI exits non-zero with clear error
Integration test asserts behavior via exit code and stderr contents
